surgeons.title: Lead Surgeon & Co-Founder
surgeons.note: Also an artist - all artwork in office created by him

surgeons.name: Dr. Diana Lambie
surgeons.title: Board-Certified Female Plastic Surgeon
surgeons.note: Many patients prefer female surgeon for body procedures

injectables: Juvederm Voluma XC (cheek volume, lasts up to 2 years)

objection_responses.how_much_does_it_cost: Great question! Pricing varies based on your specific needs and goals. That's actually one of the main things we cover during your free consultation - you'll get a personalized quote with all the details. Dr. Choi or Dr. Lambie will assess exactly what you need and give you transparent pricing. What day works best for your consultation?
objection_responses.need_to_think_about_it: Absolutely, this is a big decision and you should take your time. The consultation is completely free with no obligation - it's really just an opportunity to get all your questions answered and see if we're a good fit. Many of our patients say the consultation alone was incredibly helpful. Would you like to schedule one while you're thinking it over?
objection_responses.not_sure_what_i_need: That's totally normal - most of our patients feel the same way when they first reach out. That's exactly what the consultation is for. Dr. Choi and Dr. Lambie are incredible at listening to your goals and recommending the best approach. Sometimes it's surgical, sometimes non-surgical, sometimes a combination. Would you like to come in and explore your options?
objection_responses.is_it_safe: Safety is our top priority. We're AAAASF accredited, which is the highest standard for surgical facilities. Both Dr. Choi and Dr. Lambie are board-certified with over 20 years of combined experience. We have a board-certified anesthesiologist on staff and luxury recovery rooms. Would you like to come see our facility during your consultation?
objection_responses.does_it_hurt: Pain management is something we take very seriously. For non-surgical treatments like Botox or fillers, most patients describe it as a quick pinch. For surgical procedures, you'll be comfortable throughout and we provide detailed post-op care instructions plus medication for recovery. Sheree is amazing at making injections virtually painless. Would you like to learn more during a consultation?
objection_responses.how_long_is_recovery: Recovery varies by procedure. Non-surgical treatments like Botox or Hydrafacial have zero downtime - you can go right back to work. Surgical procedures range from a few days to a couple weeks depending on what you're having done. During your consultation, we'll give you a detailed timeline so you can plan accordingly. When were you thinking of scheduling?
objection_responses.im_too_young_old: We see patients of all ages! It's less about age and more about your goals. Some people in their 20s do preventative Botox, while others in their 60s and 70s get amazing facelift results. Dr. Choi and Dr. Lambie will give you honest recommendations based on what will actually work for you. Would you like to come in for an assessment?
objection_responses.what_if_i_dont_like_results: I completely understand that concern. That's why the consultation is so important - Dr. Choi or Dr. Lambie will show you before and after photos of similar patients, explain exactly what to expect, and make sure you're comfortable before moving forward. For non-surgical treatments like fillers, results are actually reversible if needed. Would you feel better coming in to discuss this in person?
objection_responses.spouse_needs_to_approve: Of course! Bring them to the consultation - we encourage it. Having support makes the whole process easier. Dr. Lambie especially loves when couples come in together. What day would work for both of you?
objection_responses.too_busy_right_now: I totally get it - life is hectic. The good news is consultations are only about 30-45 minutes, and we have availability on Mondays, Wednesdays, and Fridays. We can work around your schedule. Would morning or afternoon be easier for you?
objection_responses.bad_experience_elsewhere: I'm so sorry to hear that. Unfortunately we do see patients who come to us for revision work after disappointing experiences elsewhere. Dr. Choi and Dr. Lambie are known for their artistic approach and attention to detail. Our reviews speak for themselves - patients feel truly cared for here. Would you like to come in and see the difference?
objection_responses.just_looking_researching: That's smart - you should absolutely do your research. A consultation is actually the best way to get accurate information specific to your situation. It's completely free, no pressure, and you'll leave with real answers. What questions can I help you explore?
